title: oncidium arangoi
intro: Oncidium arangoi, a species of orchid, is a type of flowering plant native to South America, particularly in the Andean region. The medicinal properties of Oncidium arangoi are attributed to its alkaloids, which have been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its antiviral and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections, fever, and pain. Herbal preparations of Oncidium arangoi can be found in the form of extracts, tinctures, and infusions, and are often used to make teas, ointments, and salves for topical application.
